title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Rocks D. Xebec, Figarland Garling, Scopper Gaban, Unknown person #2, Nami as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rocks and Saint Garling are clashing in the Northwest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: > No one's safe on God Valley!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's treasure, but you wanna go the other way?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got the rocks crew behind us and the navy to our front!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go on ahead, Rayleigh! I'll handle things here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Move the ship to the southwest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Everything else is still up for grabs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaky, there's something I've got to tell you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't say another word. I already know..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We couldn't have asked for a better opportunity!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes!! I don't know which is which, so just eat up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kuma!! Don't think, just eat it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If ve... get a single person off this island alive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: VE CAN CALL THIS A VICTORY!!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
